{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-50202", "cvss": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-668", "name": "Exposure of Resource to Wrong Sphere"}], "description": "### Summary

The JWT signing key cache in `TokenKeyResolver` uses `kid` as the sole cache key without namespacing by authority. In applications with multiple `JwtBearer` schemes pointing to different identity providers, a key fetched for one scheme can satisfy token validation for another. Additionally, cached keys have no expiration, so rotated or revoked keys remain trusted until the application process restarts.

### Impact

In multi-scheme deployments, an attacker who controls one identity provider's signing key can forge tokens accepted by other schemes within the same application. For all applications using `TokenKeyResolver`, a signing key removed from the identity provider's JWKS endpoint remains trusted indefinitely.

### Mitigations

If an immediate upgrade is not possible:

- In multi-scheme deployments, configure only one `JwtBearer` scheme per application when different identity providers are required.
- Restart the application process after an identity provider signing key rotation to clear stale cached keys.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0029, "percentile": 0.20587}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7fqc-p256-7pwj", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T20:31:47Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7fqc-p256-7pwj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7fqc-p256-7pwj"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-50202"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-17T23:17:04Z", "published_at": "2026-07-02T20:31:47Z", "references": ["https://github.com/SteeltoeOSS/security-advisories/security/advisories/GHSA-7fqc-p256-7pwj", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-50202", "https://github.com/SteeltoeOSS/Steeltoe/commit/04db2ace3b806bfe0260bb7d4bda340f241eff48", "https://github.com/SteeltoeOSS/Steeltoe/commit/17b27b8be546ae3f83a2f6e91d45e0c84c5314b7", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7fqc-p256-7pwj"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/SteeltoeOSS/security-advisories/security-advisories/GHSA-7fqc-p256-7pwj", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/SteeltoeOSS/security-advisories", "summary": "Steeltoe's static JWKS cache shared across schemes and never invalidated", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T20:31:48Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7fqc-p256-7pwj", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "Steeltoe.Security.Authentication.JwtBearer"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 4.1.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "Steeltoe.Security.Authentication.OpenIdConnect"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 4.1.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.4.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "Steeltoe.Security.Authentication.CloudFoundryBase"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.3.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Steeltoe's static JWKS cache shared across schemes and never invalidated
